summary: Plan-mode inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are performed. The shard has no shared canonical; each listed open PR is classified independently. Three validator-identified security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security with exact PR refs, and one superseded close recommendation remains where the hydrated artifact contains a ClawSweeper supersession comment and a hydrated replacement PR.
